description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Blue and green Active briefs, has a soft elasticated waistband with branding on it, low waist, offers tagless comfort and double layered pouch with tape detail near the hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Tumble dry medium Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size L The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
